name: Patriot Energy Corporation
summary: Patriot Energy Corporation, through its subsidiary, TelTeck Solutions, designs and develops telematic products. It offers WAMS, a water alarm monitoring system, which is sued for the prevention of unnecessary loss of drinkable water. The company also distributes dual H2O engine oxygenators and tri-brid engine technologies. Patriot Energy Corporation was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
